settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions

settings.text: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us — we're happy to help.

settings.heading: Which products can be personalized or engraved?
settings.row_content: The majority of our products can be personalized. Any product page that has an engraving or personalization field in the product options supports custom text. If you're unsure about a specific item, contact us before ordering and we'll confirm.

settings.heading: How do I submit my personalization text?
settings.row_content: On the product page, enter your personalization details in the designated text field before adding to cart. Include the recipient's name, dates, title, or any message you'd like engraved. Double-check spelling carefully — personalized items cannot be returned due to text errors you submitted.

settings.heading: Will I see a proof before you engrave it?
settings.row_content: Yes — for most personalized orders, we send a digital proof to your email before beginning engraving. You can request changes at no charge. Production begins only after you approve the proof. Please respond to proof emails promptly as delays in approval can affect your delivery date.

settings.heading: Can you engrave a company logo or custom artwork?
settings.row_content: Yes. We can engrave vector logos (AI, EPS, SVG, or high-resolution PNG) on most of our products. Please contact us before ordering to share your artwork file so we can confirm it will engrave well on your chosen product.

settings.heading: How long does engraving add to the production time?
settings.row_content: Most personalized items are engraved within 1–2 business days after proof approval. This is in addition to standard shipping time. If you have a firm deadline, please note it in your order or message us — we'll do our best to accommodate rush timelines.

settings.heading: Can personalized items be returned or exchanged?
settings.row_content: Personalized and custom-engraved items are non-returnable because they are made specifically for you. If there is an error in the engraving that was our fault, we will re-produce and reship at no charge. This is why our proof approval step is so important — please review your proof carefully before approving.

settings.heading: Do you offer bulk engraving for corporate or event orders?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. We specialize in bulk personalized orders for corporate recognition programs, award ceremonies, and events. Discounts apply at 10+ units, with deeper pricing at larger quantities. Visit our Corporate Gifting page or contact us for a custom quote.

settings.heading: Personalization & Engraving
How much does shipping cost?
settings.row_content: Shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on your location and selected delivery method.

settings.heading: How long does delivery take?
settings.row_content: Standard shipping typically takes 5–10 business days. Expedited shipping options (2–3 business days) are available at checkout for an additional fee. Processing time is 1–2 business days before your order ships.

settings.heading: Do you ship internationally?
settings.row_content: Yes, we ship to many countries worldwide. International shipping times vary by destination — typically 10–21 business days. Please note that customers are responsible for any customs duties or import taxes that may apply in their country.

settings.heading: How do I track my order?
settings.row_content: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can use this to track your package directly on the carrier's website. If you haven't received a tracking email within 3 business days of your order, please check your spam folder or contact us.

settings.heading: What if my package arrives damaged?
settings.row_content: We're so sorry if that happens! Please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with a photo of the damaged item and packaging. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you — no need to return the damaged item.

settings.heading: Shipping & Delivery
What payment methods do you accept?
settings.row_content: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay. All transactions are secured with SSL encryption.

settings.heading: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.row_content: We begin processing orders quickly, so changes may not always be possible. Please contact us immediately after placing your order if you need to make changes. If your order has already been shipped, you can return it once received.

settings.heading: Is it safe to shop on your website?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. Our website uses industry-standard SSL encryption to protect your personal and payment information. We never store your full credit card details. Shopping with ModernTimez is completely secure.

settings.heading: Do you offer gift cards?
settings.row_content: Yes! Gift cards are available in multiple denominations and make a wonderful present when you're not sure what to choose. They're delivered digitally by email and never expire. Browse our gift cards here.

settings.heading: Orders & Payments
What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for items in their original, unused condition and packaging. To start a return, please contact us with your order number. We'll send you a prepaid return label.

settings.heading: How long does a refund take?
settings.row_content: Once we receive your returned item, we'll inspect it and process your refund within 3–5 business days. Refunds are issued to the original payment method. Depending on your bank, it may take an additional 5–10 business days to appear on your statement.

settings.heading: What items cannot be returned?
settings.row_content: For hygiene and safety reasons, the following items are non-returnable: personalized or custom-engraved products, digital items (gift cards), and items that have been used or opened. Sale items are final sale unless they arrive damaged or defective.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchanges
Do you offer gift wrapping?
settings.row_content: Yes! We offer beautiful gift wrapping for a small additional fee. You can add gift wrapping to your order at checkout. We'll present your item in elegant tissue paper inside a branded gift box, tied with a ribbon — ready to give.

settings.heading: Can I include a personalized gift message?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. During checkout, there's a field where you can add a personal message. We'll print it on a gift card and include it with your order. There's no extra charge for the message.

settings.heading: Can you ship directly to the gift recipient?
settings.row_content: Yes! Simply enter the recipient's address as the shipping address at checkout, and add a gift message so they know who it's from. We do not include any pricing or invoices inside the package — everything goes to the email address you provide at checkout.

settings.heading: I need help finding the perfect gift — can you help?
settings.row_content: We'd love to help! Send us a message with a little info about the person (their interests, age, the occasion, your budget) and we'll suggest the perfect gift. We offer this personal shopping service completely free of charge.

settings.heading: Gifting Questions
Still have questions?

settings.text: Our team is here to help. Drop us a message and we'll get back to you within 1 business day.
